title: rubus adscitus
intro: Rubus adscitus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan strawberry, is a type of edible fruit-bearing plant that belongs to the rose family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus adscitus include treating digestive issues, reducing fever, and alleviating menstrual cramps, among others. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, powder, and juice, which can be used to harness its medicinal and health benefits.
